subcodes.first_line: O thou who art drawn by the divine fragrances! These are the days of Naw-Rúz, when the people of Persia are absorbed in revelry and festivity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله ایام نوروز است و ایرانیان مشغول بعیش و نوش و این
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
